options.content: ⬅ Return to Navigation  |  , 🔄 Reset Filters

targets.rawSql:
WITH top_segments AS 
(  SELECT object_name,obj_type, subobject_name, avg(table_scans) 
FROM awr_seg_table_scan  
WHERE '$dbanme' != '' AND '$instance' != '' 
AND '$start_snap' != '' AND '$end_snap' != ''    
AND dbname = '$dbname'    AND instance = '$instance'    
AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int 
AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int  
AND pcttotal >= 10  
GROUP BY object_name, obj_type,subobject_name  
ORDER BY    CASE      WHEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int = split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int 
THEN MAX(table_scans) 
ELSE AVG(table_scans)    
END DESC Limit 10)    
SELECT   s.object_name, s.obj_type,s.subobject_name,  Avg(s.table_scans) AS Table_Scans,  ROUND(AVG(s.pcttotal),2) AS pct_total 
FROM awr_seg_table_scan s 
JOIN top_segments t ON t.object_name = s.object_name 
WHERE dbname = '$dbname'  AND instance = '$instance'  
AND begin_snap BETWEEN split_part('$start_snap',' - ',1)::int 
AND split_part('$end_snap',' - ',1)::int 
GROUP BY s.object_name,s.obj_type,s.subobject_name  
ORDER BY Table_Scans DESC;

list.description: Portal URL — set automatically from portal Settings → Access Control
list.label: Portal URL
list.name: portal_url

list.description: Grafana URL — set automatically from portal Settings → Access Control
list.label: Grafana URL
list.name: grafana_url

list.label: Database
list.name: dbname
list.query:
SELECT value, label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS value, '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT dbname AS value, dbname AS label
  FROM awr_load_profile
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY value;

list.label: Instance
list.name: instance
list.query:
SELECT value, label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS value, '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT instance AS value, instance AS label
  FROM awr_load_profile
  WHERE dbname = '$dbname'
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY value;

list.label: Start Snap
list.name: start_snap
list.query:
SELECT label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT begin_snap::int || ' - ' || to_char(snap_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS label
  FROM awr_load_profile
  WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND instance = '$instance'
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY label NULLS FIRST;

list.label: End Snap
list.name: end_snap
list.query:
SELECT label FROM (
  SELECT '' AS label
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT begin_snap::int || ' - ' || to_char(snap_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS label
  FROM awr_load_profile
  WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND instance = '$instance'
) AS combined_results
ORDER BY label NULLS FIRST;
